global_flags.--output / -o: Output format: json or table (default table)

groups.trade: Spot order placement and management (auth required)
groups.futures-paper: Futures paper trading simulation with leverage, margin, and liquidation (no auth required)
groups.paper: Spot paper trading simulation (no auth required)

parameters.name: --asset
parameters.description: Comma-delimited list of assets to query

parameters.name: --pair
parameters.description: Comma-delimited list of pairs to query

commands.name: ticker
commands.description: Get ticker data (ask, bid, last trade, volume) for trading pairs.

parameters.name: --closetime
parameters.description: Which time to use: open, close, both

parameters.name: txid
parameters.description: One or more trade transaction IDs

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: One or more ledger entry IDs

commands.name: volume
commands.description: Get trade volume and fee schedule.

parameters.name: --pair
parameters.description: Comma-delimited list of pairs for fee info

parameters.name: --fields
parameters.description: Comma-delimited list of fields to include

commands.name: export-retrieve
commands.description: Download export report (writes file to disk).

parameters.name: --price2
parameters.description: Secondary price for stop-loss-limit and take-profit-limit

parameters.name: --timeinforce
parameters.description: Time in force: GTC, IOC, GTD

parameters.name: --price2
parameters.description: Secondary price for stop-loss-limit and take-profit-limit

parameters.name: --timeinforce
parameters.description: Time in force: GTC, IOC, GTD

parameters.name: file
parameters.description: Path to JSON file with order definitions

parameters.name: --txid
parameters.description: Transaction ID of order to amend

parameters.name: --cl-ord-id
parameters.description: Client order ID of order to amend

parameters.name: --display-qty
parameters.description: New display quantity for iceberg orders

parameters.name: txid
parameters.description: Transaction ID of order to edit

parameters.name: txid
parameters.description: Transaction IDs of orders to cancel

parameters.name: txid
parameters.description: Transaction IDs of orders to cancel

commands.name: order-cancel-after
commands.description: Dead man's switch: cancel all after timeout.

commands.name: deposit-methods
commands.description: Get deposit methods for an asset.

commands.name: subaccount-transfer
commands.example: kraken subaccount transfer USD 5000 --from main --to trading-bot

commands.name: futures-order-buy

parameters.name: --type
parameters.description: Order type: market, limit, post, stop, take-profit, ioc, trailing-stop, fok (default: limit)

commands.example: kraken futures order buy PF_XBTUSD 1 --type limit --price 50000

commands.name: futures-order-sell

parameters.name: --type
parameters.description: Order type: market, limit, post, stop, take-profit, ioc, trailing-stop, fok (default: limit)

commands.example: kraken futures order sell PF_XBTUSD 1 --type limit --price 100000

parameters.name: --symbol
parameters.description: Cancel only orders for this symbol

parameters.name: json
parameters.description: Path to JSON file with order definitions

commands.name: futures-transfer
commands.description: Transfer between spot and futures wallets.

commands.name: futures-trading-instruments
commands.description: Get trading instruments with optional contract type filter.

parameters.name: --contract-type
parameters.description: Filter by contract type: futures_inverse, futures_vanilla, flexible_futures

commands.name: futures-historical-funding-rates
commands.description: Get historical funding rates for a perpetual contract.

commands.name: futures-order-status
commands.description: Get status of specific orders by ID.

parameters.name: ORDER_ID
parameters.description: One or more order IDs to query

commands.name: futures-set-pnl-preference
commands.description: Set PnL preference for a symbol.

commands.name: futures-subaccount-status
commands.description: Get trading-enabled status for a subaccount.

commands.name: futures-set-subaccount-status
commands.description: Enable or disable trading for a subaccount.

commands.name: futures-wallet-transfer
commands.example: kraken futures wallet-transfer main flex USD 100

commands.name: futures-ws-ticker

parameters.name: market
parameters.description: One or more market symbols to stream

commands.example: kraken futures ws ticker PF_XBTUSD PF_ETHUSD

parameters.name: market
parameters.description: One or more market symbols to stream

parameters.name: market
parameters.description: One or more market symbols to stream

parameters.name: pair
parameters.description: Trading pairs (optional, streams all if omitted)

commands.name: ws-add-order

parameters.name: --order-type
parameters.description: Order type: limit, market, stop-loss, take-profit, etc.

parameters.name: --trigger-price-type
parameters.description: Trigger price type: static, pct, quote

commands.example: kraken ws add-order --order-type limit --side buy --symbol BTC/USD --order-qty 0.001 --limit-price 50000

commands.name: ws-amend-order
commands.description: Amend an existing order via WebSocket.

commands.name: ws-cancel-order
commands.description: Cancel one or more orders via WebSocket.

parameters.name: --order-userref
parameters.description: Numeric client order refs to cancel

commands.name: ws-cancel-all
commands.description: Cancel all open orders via WebSocket.

commands.name: ws-cancel-after
commands.description: Dead man switch: cancel all orders after timeout via WebSocket.

parameters.name: timeout
parameters.description: Timeout in seconds (0 to disable, must be < 86400)

commands.name: ws-batch-add
commands.description: Batch add 2-15 orders via WebSocket (single pair).

parameters.name: --orders
parameters.description: Orders as JSON array (see Kraken WS V2 batch_add docs)

parameters.name: --orders
parameters.description: Order IDs or user refs to cancel

parameters.name: --cl-ord-id
parameters.description: Additional client order IDs to cancel

commands.name: futures-paper-init
commands.description: Initialize futures paper trading account with collateral.

commands.name: futures-paper-reset
commands.description: Reset futures paper account (clear positions, orders, fills).

commands.name: futures-paper-balance
commands.description: Show futures paper collateral, used margin, available margin, and unrealized P&L.

commands.name: futures-paper-status
commands.description: Account summary: equity, P&L since start, unrealized P&L, position and order counts.

commands.name: futures-paper-buy
commands.description: Place a futures paper buy (long) order.

parameters.name: --type
parameters.description: Order type: market, limit, post, stop, take-profit, ioc, trailing-stop, fok (default: limit)

parameters.name: --price
parameters.description: Limit price (required for limit, post, ioc, fok)

commands.example: kraken futures paper buy PF_XBTUSD 1 --leverage 10 --type market

commands.name: futures-paper-sell
commands.description: Place a futures paper sell (short) order.

parameters.name: --type
parameters.description: Order type: market, limit, post, stop, take-profit, ioc, trailing-stop, fok (default: limit)

parameters.name: --price
parameters.description: Limit price (required for limit, post, ioc, fok)

commands.example: kraken futures paper sell PF_ETHUSD 5 --leverage 20 --type market

commands.name: futures-paper-orders
commands.description: Show open resting futures paper orders.

commands.name: futures-paper-order-status
commands.description: Get status of a specific futures paper order.

commands.name: futures-paper-edit-order
commands.description: Edit a resting futures paper order.

commands.name: futures-paper-cancel
commands.description: Cancel a futures paper order by order ID or client order ID.

commands.name: futures-paper-cancel-all
commands.description: Cancel all open futures paper orders.

commands.name: futures-paper-batch-order
commands.description: Place a batch of futures paper orders from a JSON array.

parameters.name: JSON
parameters.description: JSON array of orders (same format as live futures batch-order)

commands.name: futures-paper-positions
commands.description: Show open futures paper positions with mark price, liquidation price, and unrealized P&L.

commands.name: futures-paper-history
commands.description: Show closed positions, cancelled orders, and realized P&L.

commands.name: futures-paper-leverage
commands.description: Get current leverage preferences per symbol.

commands.name: futures-paper-set-leverage
commands.description: Set default leverage for a futures symbol.
